title: chamaemelum nobile var. discoideum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile var. discoideum, also known as Chamomile, is a fragrant, flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Chamaemelum nobile var. discoideum include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Chamomile tea, essential oil, and capsules are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
